calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Termination Of Irrevocable Trust Due To Changed Circumstances Not Known Or Anticipated By Trustors
Off Calendar Sep-22-2020 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Approving Termination Of Irrevocable Trust Due To Changed Circumstances Not Known Or Anticipated By Trustors
Off Calendar Jul-07-2020 Continued To Sep-22-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Talbot appeared by telephone for Karen Ryan and Katherin Molina (Co-Trustees).

The Court noted that the Parties still have a venue problem. Mr. Talbot stated that previous Counsel filed in San Francisco, that he is hoping the Court will move for approval as the Beneficiaries are not objecting and that it will be expensive to move venue to Marin or San Mateo County. Mr. Talbot also stated that one of the Beneficiaries lives in San Francisco and that there is contact with that Beneficiary. The Court stated that there is no authority to construe administration, that there is no administration here (SF) and noted that Mr. Talbot is in Walnut Creek. The Court also stated that it can't just terminate this trust, that the Parties will have to start all over to amend the trust and file a new petition anyway, and that this is an overreach. The Petition for Order Approving Termination of Irrevocable Trust Due to Changed Circumstances Not Known or Anticipated by Trustors is continued to Sep. 22, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Talbot stated that he will advise the Parties to file a dismissal between now and then.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court received information that Mr. Roddick had a medical issue. The Petition for Order Approving Termination of Irrevocable Trust Due to Changed Circumstances is continued to December 31, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
